title: Graaff-Reinet learners published in Imibala’s first book
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Imibala Trust recently launched a project that resulted in the publication of its first Imibala book, Voices from the Heartland.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The Imibala Trust recently launched a project that resulted in the publication of its first Imibala book, Voices from the Heartland."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Imibala Trust is a registered South African NPO that was initiated by Gaynor Rupert and works with children of schoolgoing age whose lives are affected by impoverished circumstances."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It provides a platform to offer programmes that make a substantial and measurable difference in the lives of the children, both currently and as they prepare for their lives after school.","html":"It provides a platform to offer programmes that make a substantial and measurable difference in the lives of the children, both currently and as they prepare for their lives after school."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All children, regardless of race or creed, are assisted through these programmes.","html":"All children, regardless of race or creed, are assisted through these programmes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Imibala book consists of poems, stories and artwork created by young Imibala South Africans aged 9 to 20.","html":"The Imibala book consists of poems, stories and artwork created by young Imibala South Africans aged 9 to 20."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The contributors come from a wide range of schools and communities, including Graaff-Reinet, Somerset West, Strand, Hermanus and Macassar.","html":"The contributors come from a wide range of schools and communities, including Graaff-Reinet, Somerset West, Strand, Hermanus and Macassar."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“We are very proud of the 17 learners from our Graaff-Reinet schools whose work was chosen to be featured in the book,” says Cindy Roux, manager of the Imibala Trust office in Graaff-Reinet.","html":"“We are very proud of the 17 learners from our Graaff-Reinet schools whose work was chosen to be featured in the book,” says Cindy Roux, manager of the Imibala Trust office in Graaff-Reinet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These learners are:","html":"These learners are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Graaff-Reinet Primary: Lyle West• Narsingstraat Primary: Tyrese Grootboom• Ryneveld Primary: Leleti Lomberg• Thembalesizwe Primary: Imelda Green, Imangenkosyiam Tzhazibane, Siyazinqca Koos, Avumile Khanzi, Amyoli Skade• Asherville Secondary: Ayesha Wagenaar• Nqweba Secondary: Rosetha Williams• Union High: Clea Clark, Jade Slater, Amber Slater, Linda Tadesse, Jourdon Koeberg, Gerda Clarke, Saskia Strydom.","html":"• Graaff-Reinet Primary: Lyle West
• Narsingstraat Primary: Tyrese Grootboom
• Ryneveld Primary: Leleti Lomberg
• Thembalesizwe Primary: Imelda Green, Imangenkosyiam Tzhazibane, Siyazinqca Koos, Avumile Khanzi, Amyoli Skade
• Asherville Secondary: Ayesha Wagenaar
• Nqweba Secondary: Rosetha Williams
• Union High: Clea Clark, Jade Slater, Amber Slater, Linda Tadesse, Jourdon Koeberg, Gerda Clarke, Saskia Strydom."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The book is more than just a creative showcase - it is a platform for youth voices and a celebration of identity, pride and community.","html":"“The book is more than just a creative showcase - it is a platform for youth voices and a celebration of identity, pride and community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It formed part of a broader celebration of culture and heritage at the 2025 Indie Authors’ Rise Up - Fire Fringe Festival earlier in the year.”","html":"It formed part of a broader celebration of culture and heritage at the 2025 Indie Authors’ Rise Up - Fire Fringe Festival earlier in the year.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Those who would like to purchase a book may visit the Imibala office at 46 Church Street in Graaff-Reinet.","html":"Those who would like to purchase a book may visit the Imibala office at 46 Church Street in Graaff-Reinet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"All proceeds from the sales will go directly to the Imibala Trust’s education and development programmes.","html":"All proceeds from the sales will go directly to the Imibala Trust’s education and development programmes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information on the Imibala Trust, visit www.imibalatrust.com or pop into the office.","html":"For more information on the Imibala Trust, visit www.imibalatrust.com or pop into the office."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Graaff-Reinet learners published in Imibala’s first book
